sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bits (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, data BITSTRING);
SELECT id, octet_length(data) ** 2 AS length_squared FROM test_bits WHERE data IS NOT NULL ORDER BY length_squared;
SELECT id, (SELECT octet_length(data) FROM test_bits WHERE data IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1) ** (2 ** 3) AS complex_length FROM test_bits;
WITH bit_lengths AS (SELECT id, octet_length(data) AS length FROM test_bits WHERE data IS NOT NULL) SELECT id, length, length ** 2 AS squared_length FROM bit_lengths HAVING squared_length > 5;
CREATE TABLE test_values (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, num_val INTEGER, bit_val BITSTRING);
INSERT INTO test_values VALUES (1, 2, '111'::BITSTRING), (2, 4, '1001'::BITSTRING), (3, NULL, '010'::BITSTRING), (4, 6, NULL);

SELECT t1.id, octet_length(t1.bit_val) AS length, t2.num_val ** 2 AS num_squared FROM test_values t1 JOIN test_values t2 ON octet_length(t1.bit_val) = t2.num_val WHERE t1.num_val IS NOT NULL ORDER BY length;
SELECT id, octet_length(data) FROM (SELECT id, data FROM test_bits WHERE data IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT id, '0000'::BITSTRING FROM test_bits) AS combined_bits WHERE octet_length(data) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_bits AS SELECT id, octet_length(data) ** 2 AS squared_length FROM test_bits WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(squared_length) FROM temp_bits HAVING AVG(squared_length) > 1;
